text: Within this angular modern space, I am struck by a sense of anticipation. The glass walls evoke transparency and reflection—literally and metaphorically. Entering the R+D exhibit inside, the vibrant visuals and thoughtful displays beckon me toward curiosity and contemplation. Here, progress and questioning intertwine; I feel both excited and quietly challenged to consider the human urge to innovate and the responsibilities that come with it. I am acutely aware of being part of a collective search for meaning and advancement.
